command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44TTARZqZm4zxSK.b3f2309fec40 --database VPbZo3VRZUT62wWDPHVeqm --execute 
-- Distribuição de tenantId em inventory
SELECT 'inventory' AS tabela, tenantId, COUNT(*) AS qtd
FROM inventory
GROUP BY tenantId
ORDER BY tenantId;

-- Distribuição de tenantId em inventoryMovements
SELECT 'inventoryMovements' AS tabela, tenantId, COUNT(*) AS qtd
FROM inventoryMovements
GROUP BY tenantId
ORDER BY tenantId;

-- Total geral
SELECT 'inventory_total' AS tabela, COUNT(*) AS total FROM inventory;
SELECT 'inventoryMovements_total' AS tabela, COUNT(*) AS total FROM inventoryMovements;
